### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport signal\r\nimport traceback\r\nfrom contextlib import asynccontextmanager\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\nfrom typing import AsyncGenerator\r\n\r\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\nfrom .broker import (\r\n    BrokerMessage,\r\n    ack_job,\r\n    ensure_group,\r\n    push_dead_letter,\r\n    read_jobs,\r\n    reclaim_stuck,\r\n    update_queue_depth,\r\n)\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOB_DURATION_SECONDS, JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL, JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobState\r\nfrom .state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\nfrom .tasks import get_task_definition, make_context\r\n \r\n \r\nclass JobCanceled(Exception):\r\n    pass\r\n \r\n \r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"worker\")\r\n \r\n \r\n@asynccontextmanager\r\nasync def _session_scope() -> AsyncGenerator[AsyncSession, None]:\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as session:\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            yield session\r\n \r\n \r\nasync def _check_canceled(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job and job.cancel_requested:\r\n            raise JobCanceled(f\"Job {job_id} canceled\")\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _process_message(msg: BrokerMessage, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    fields = msg.fields\r\n    job_id = fields.get(\"job_id\")\r\n    if not job_id:\r\n        logger.error(\"Missing job_id in message\", extra={\"stream_id\": msg.entry_id})\r\n        await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    # Phase 1: transition QUEUED -> RUNNING and increment attempts\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.warning(\"Job not found; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if job.state in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job already in terminal state; acking\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Idempotency: if job has already succeeded, do not re-run side effects.\r\n        if job.idempotency_key and job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED:\r\n            logger.info(\"Idempotent re-delivery; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Only process QUEUED jobs here. If state changed unexpectedly, ack.\r\n        if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job not QUEUED; skipping\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        attempt = job.attempts + 1\r\n        job.attempts = attempt\r\n        try:\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Worker starting execution\")\r\n        except InvalidStateTransition:\r\n            logger.exception(\"Invalid state transition to RUNNING\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n    # Phase 2: execute task outside transaction\r\n    job_type = fields.get(\"type\") or job.type\r\n    task_def = get_task_definition(job_type)\r\n\r\n    import time\r\n\r\n    start = time.monotonic()\r\n    JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type).inc()\r\n\r\n    async def check_canceled() -> None:\r\n        await _check_canceled(job_id)\r\n\r\n    # Reload job state for the context\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as exec_session:\r\n        job_for_ctx = await exec_session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n\r\n    if job_for_ctx is None:\r\n        logger.error(\"Job disappeared before task execution\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n        await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    ctx_logger = get_logger(f\"miniqueue.task.{task_def.name}\", service=\"worker\")\r\n    ctx = make_context(\r\n        job=job_for_ctx,\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=None,\r\n        logger=ctx_logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        payload = task_def.payload_model.model_validate(job_for_ctx.payload)\r\n        result = await task_def.func(ctx, payload)\r\n        exc: BaseException | None = None\r\n        canceled = False\r\n    except JobCanceled:\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = None\r\n        canceled = True\r\n    except BaseException as e:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = e\r\n        canceled = False\r\n\r\n    duration = time.monotonic() - start\r\n    JOB_DURATION_SECONDS.labels(type=job_type).observe(duration)\r\n\r\n    # Phase 3: final state transition + result persistence\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.error(\"Job disappeared before completion\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if canceled:\r\n            job.result = None\r\n            job.last_error = \"Canceled\"\r\n            job.cancel_requested = False\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled cooperatively\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.CANCELED.value).inc()\r\n        elif exc is None:\r\n            job.result = result\r\n            job.last_error = None\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"Job succeeded\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.SUCCEEDED.value).inc()\r\n        else:\r\n            # Failure path: decide between retry and DEAD\r\n            job.last_error = \"\".join(\r\n                traceback.format_exception_only(type(exc), exc)\r\n            ).strip()\r\n\r\n            if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.DEAD, \"Job reached max attempts\")\r\n                await push_dead_letter(\r\n                    {\r\n                        \"job_id\": job.id,\r\n                        \"type\": job.type,\r\n                        \"queue\": job.queue,\r\n                        \"error\": job.last_error or \"\",\r\n                    }\r\n                )\r\n                JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.DEAD.value).inc()\r\n            else:\r\n                delay = compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n                    job.attempts,\r\n                    base=settings.backoff_base_seconds,\r\n                    multiplier=settings.backoff_multiplier,\r\n                    cap=settings.backoff_cap_seconds,\r\n                )\r\n                job.next_run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=delay)\r\n                job.is_enqueued = False\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job scheduled for retry\")\r\n\r\n    # Only XACK after DB commit succeeded.\r\n    await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def worker_loop(index: int, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    while True:\r\n        messages = await read_jobs(\r\n            queue=queue,\r\n            consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n            count=1,\r\n            block_ms=5_000,\r\n        )\r\n        if not messages:\r\n            continue\r\n        for msg in messages:\r\n            try:\r\n                await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n            except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                logger.exception(\"Unhandled error in worker loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def reclaim_loop(*, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    while True:\r\n        await asyncio.sleep(settings.reclaim_interval_sec)\r\n        try:\r\n            messages = await reclaim_stuck(\r\n                queue=queue,\r\n                consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n                min_idle_ms=settings.visibility_timeout_ms,\r\n            )\r\n            for msg in messages:\r\n                try:\r\n                    await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n                except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                    logger.exception(\r\n                        \"Unhandled error processing reclaimed message\",\r\n                        extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name},\r\n                    )\r\n            await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"Error in reclaim loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def main() -> None:\r\n    configure_logging(service=\"worker\")\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    # Start Prometheus metrics server for this process.\r\n    start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n\r\n    await init_db()\r\n    await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n\r\n    queue = settings.queue_default\r\n    consumer_name = f\"worker-{id(asyncio.current_task())}\"\r\n\r\n    tasks = [\r\n        asyncio.create_task(worker_loop(i, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name))\r\n        for i in range(settings.worker_concurrency)\r\n    ]\r\n    tasks.append(asyncio.create_task(reclaim_loop(queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)))\r\n\r\n    stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n\r\n    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n\r\n    for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n        loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n\r\n    await stop_event.wait()\r\n    for t in tasks:\r\n        t.cancel()\r\n    await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    asyncio.run(main())\r\n\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "25937309b6196e7888a271b440f61da0503e4b67739bbfc0c18ed9968a830008",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Tuple\r\n\r\nimport redis.asyncio as redis\r\nfrom redis.exceptions import ResponseError\r\n\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .logging import get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL, QUEUE_DEPTH, WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"broker\")\r\n\r\n_redis_client: redis.Redis | None = None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_redis() -> redis.Redis:\r\n    global _redis_client\r\n    if _redis_client is None:\r\n        settings = get_settings()\r\n        _redis_client = redis.from_url(settings.redis_url)\r\n    return _redis_client\r\n\r\n\r\ndef stream_for_queue(queue: str) -> str:\r\n    return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\r\n\r\n\r\nDEAD_LETTER_STREAM = \"jobs:dlq\"\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass BrokerMessage:\r\n    stream: str\r\n    entry_id: str\r\n    fields: Dict[str, Any]\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def ensure_group(queue: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Ensure the Redis Stream and consumer group exist.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        await client.xgroup_create(stream, settings.consumer_group, id=\"0-0\", mkstream=True)\r\n        logger.info(\"Created consumer group\", extra={\"stream\": stream})\r\n    except ResponseError as exc:\r\n        # BUSYGROUP means it already exists; ignore.\r\n        if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def enqueue_job(\r\n    *,\r\n    job_id: str,\r\n    job_type: str,\r\n    queue: str,\r\n    idempotency_key: str | None,\r\n) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"XADD a job reference to the appropriate stream.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n    fields: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n        \"job_id\": job_id,\r\n        \"type\": job_type,\r\n        \"queue\": queue,\r\n    }\r\n    if idempotency_key:\r\n        fields[\"idempotency_key\"] = idempotency_key\r\n\r\n    entry_id = await client.xadd(stream, fields)\r\n    JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, queue=queue).inc()\r\n    return entry_id\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def push_dead_letter(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    return await client.xadd(DEAD_LETTER_STREAM, payload)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def read_jobs(\r\n    *,\r\n    queue: str,\r\n    consumer_name: str,\r\n    count: int,\r\n    block_ms: int,\r\n) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n    \"\"\"Read from Redis Streams via XREADGROUP.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n\r\n    streams = {stream: \">\"}\r\n    resp: List[Tuple[str, List[Tuple[str, Dict[bytes, bytes]]]]] | None = await client.xreadgroup(\r\n        groupname=settings.consumer_group,\r\n        consumername=consumer_name,\r\n        streams=streams,\r\n        count=count,\r\n        block=block_ms,\r\n    )\r\n    messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n    if not resp:\r\n        return messages\r\n\r\n    for stream_name, entries in resp:\r\n        for entry_id, raw_fields in entries:\r\n            decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n            messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream_name, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n    return messages\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def ack_job(queue: str, entry_id: str) -> int:\r\n    \"\"\"Acknowledge processing of a job.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n    return int(\r\n        await client.xack(\r\n            stream,\r\n            settings.consumer_group,\r\n            entry_id,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def reclaim_stuck(\r\n    *,\r\n    queue: str,\r\n    consumer_name: str,\r\n    min_idle_ms: int,\r\n    count: int = 10,\r\n) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n    \"\"\"Reclaim messages that have been idle longer than min_idle_ms using XAUTOCLAIM.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n\r\n    start_id = \"0-0\"\r\n    messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        start_id, claimed = await client.xautoclaim(\r\n            stream,\r\n            settings.consumer_group,\r\n            consumer_name,\r\n            min_idle_ms,\r\n            start_id,\r\n            count=count,\r\n        )\r\n    except ResponseError:\r\n        # If group does not yet exist, nothing to reclaim.\r\n        return messages\r\n\r\n    for entry_id, raw_fields in claimed:\r\n        decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n        messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n\r\n    if messages:\r\n        WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL.inc(len(messages))\r\n\r\n    return messages\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def update_queue_depth(queue: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Update the queue depth gauge for a given queue.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n    length = await client.xlen(stream)\r\n    QUEUE_DEPTH.labels(queue=queue).set(length)\r\n\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "a8cf00756f852eee38cffb17ee307f8ffeeade4b5246cfdb913b3a75a8fb35c7",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom functools import lru_cache\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\r\n    \"\"\"Application configuration loaded from environment variables.\r\n\r\n    All services (API, worker, scheduler, CLI) share this configuration module.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n\r\n    service_name: str = \"api\"\r\n\r\n    # Persistence\r\n    db_url: str = \"sqlite+aiosqlite:///REDACTED\"\r\n\r\n    # Redis / broker\r\n    redis_url: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/0\"\r\n    queue_default: str = \"default\"\r\n    consumer_group: str = \"workers\"\r\n\r\n    # Worker behaviour\r\n    worker_concurrency: int = 4\r\n    visibility_timeout_ms: int = 30_000\r\n    reclaim_interval_sec: int = 10\r\n\r\n    # Scheduler behaviour\r\n    scheduler_interval_sec: int = 5\r\n\r\n    # Backoff defaults\r\n    backoff_base_seconds: float = 1.0\r\n    backoff_multiplier: float = 2.0\r\n    backoff_cap_seconds: float = 60.0\r\n\r\n    # Observability\r\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\r\n    metrics_port: int = 9000\r\n\r\n    class Config:\r\n        env_prefix = \"MINIQUEUE_\"\r\n        case_sensitive = False\r\n\r\n\r\n@lru_cache(maxsize=1)\r\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\r\n    \"\"\"Return cached settings instance.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    return Settings()\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "9006e7018a011b2fb83fb260d6c85335d73a8571e6f5fc2eef61874485290cc2",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nimport logging\r\nimport sys\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict\r\n\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JsonFormatter(logging.Formatter):\r\n    \"\"\"Simple JSON log formatter with common correlation fields.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:\r\n        base: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n            \"ts\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\r\n            \"level\": record.levelname,\r\n            \"logger\": record.name,\r\n            \"message\": record.getMessage(),\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        # Standard extras we care about, if present\r\n        for field in (\"service\", \"job_id\", \"stream_id\", \"consumer\", \"attempt\", \"state\"):\r\n            value = getattr(record, field, None)\r\n            if value is not None:\r\n                base[field] = value\r\n\r\n        # Include arbitrary extra dict if provided\r\n        extra: Any = getattr(record, \"extra_fields\", None)\r\n        if isinstance(extra, dict):\r\n            base.update(extra)\r\n\r\n        return json.dumps(base, separators=(\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=False)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef configure_logging(service: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Configure root logging for the given service.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    root = logging.getLogger()\r\n    if root.handlers:\r\n        # Already configured\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    root.setLevel(settings.log_level.upper())\r\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)\r\n    handler.setFormatter(JsonFormatter())\r\n    root.addHandler(handler)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_logger(name: str, *, service: str | None = None) -> logging.Logger:\r\n    \"\"\"Get a logger with a bound service name.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(name)\r\n    if service is not None:\r\n        # Add service name via LoggerAdapter\r\n        return logging.LoggerAdapter(logger, {\"service\": service})  # type: ignore[return-value]\r\n    return logger\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "9b65f28315f1caa08a6cb8a4e36533de0cb5c35bcae32c79cc05b7b191125711",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 03:31:31 GMT
Vary: Origin
```

```
{
  "1:VARINT": 1
}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4842195278606858022}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "6:VARINT": 4, "7:LEN": [{"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport signal\r\nimport traceback\r\nfrom contextlib import asynccontextmanager\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\nfrom typing import AsyncGenerator\r\n\r\nfrom prometheus_client import start_http_server\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\nfrom .broker import (\r\n    BrokerMessage,\r\n    ack_job,\r\n    ensure_group,\r\n    push_dead_letter,\r\n    read_jobs,\r\n    reclaim_stuck,\r\n    update_queue_depth,\r\n)\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session_factory, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOB_DURATION_SECONDS, JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL, JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobState\r\nfrom .state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\nfrom .tasks import get_task_definition, make_context\r\n \r\n \r\nclass JobCanceled(Exception):\r\n    pass\r\n \r\n \r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"worker\")\r\n \r\n \r\n@asynccontextmanager\r\nasync def _session_scope() -> AsyncGenerator[AsyncSession, None]:\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as session:\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            yield session\r\n \r\n \r\nasync def _check_canceled(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job and job.cancel_requested:\r\n            raise JobCanceled(f\"Job {job_id} canceled\")\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _process_message(msg: BrokerMessage, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    fields = msg.fields\r\n    job_id = fields.get(\"job_id\")\r\n    if not job_id:\r\n        logger.error(\"Missing job_id in message\", extra={\"stream_id\": msg.entry_id})\r\n        await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    # Phase 1: transition QUEUED -> RUNNING and increment attempts\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.warning(\"Job not found; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if job.state in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job already in terminal state; acking\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Idempotency: if job has already succeeded, do not re-run side effects.\r\n        if job.idempotency_key and job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED:\r\n            logger.info(\"Idempotent re-delivery; acking\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        # Only process QUEUED jobs here. If state changed unexpectedly, ack.\r\n        if job.state != JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            logger.info(\r\n                \"Job not QUEUED; skipping\",\r\n                extra={\"job_id\": job_id, \"state\": job.state.value},\r\n            )\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        attempt = job.attempts + 1\r\n        job.attempts = attempt\r\n        try:\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Worker starting execution\")\r\n        except InvalidStateTransition:\r\n            logger.exception(\"Invalid state transition to RUNNING\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n    # Phase 2: execute task outside transaction\r\n    job_type = fields.get(\"type\") or job.type\r\n    task_def = get_task_definition(job_type)\r\n\r\n    import time\r\n\r\n    start = time.monotonic()\r\n    JOBS_STARTED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type).inc()\r\n\r\n    async def check_canceled() -> None:\r\n        await _check_canceled(job_id)\r\n\r\n    # Reload job state for the context\r\n    factory = get_session_factory()\r\n    async with factory() as exec_session:\r\n        job_for_ctx = await exec_session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n\r\n    if job_for_ctx is None:\r\n        logger.error(\"Job disappeared before task execution\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n        await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    ctx_logger = get_logger(f\"miniqueue.task.{task_def.name}\", service=\"worker\")\r\n    ctx = make_context(\r\n        job=job_for_ctx,\r\n        attempt=attempt,\r\n        session=None,\r\n        logger=ctx_logger,\r\n        check_canceled=check_canceled,\r\n    )\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        payload = task_def.payload_model.model_validate(job_for_ctx.payload)\r\n        result = await task_def.func(ctx, payload)\r\n        exc: BaseException | None = None\r\n        canceled = False\r\n    except JobCanceled:\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = None\r\n        canceled = True\r\n    except BaseException as e:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n        result = None\r\n        exc = e\r\n        canceled = False\r\n\r\n    duration = time.monotonic() - start\r\n    JOB_DURATION_SECONDS.labels(type=job_type).observe(duration)\r\n\r\n    # Phase 3: final state transition + result persistence\r\n    async with _session_scope() as session:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            logger.error(\"Job disappeared before completion\", extra={\"job_id\": job_id})\r\n            await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n            return\r\n\r\n        if canceled:\r\n            job.result = None\r\n            job.last_error = \"Canceled\"\r\n            job.cancel_requested = False\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled cooperatively\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.CANCELED.value).inc()\r\n        elif exc is None:\r\n            job.result = result\r\n            job.last_error = None\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"Job succeeded\")\r\n            JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.SUCCEEDED.value).inc()\r\n        else:\r\n            # Failure path: decide between retry and DEAD\r\n            job.last_error = \"\".join(\r\n                traceback.format_exception_only(type(exc), exc)\r\n            ).strip()\r\n\r\n            if job.attempts >= job.max_attempts:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.DEAD, \"Job reached max attempts\")\r\n                await push_dead_letter(\r\n                    {\r\n                        \"job_id\": job.id,\r\n                        \"type\": job.type,\r\n                        \"queue\": job.queue,\r\n                        \"error\": job.last_error or \"\",\r\n                    }\r\n                )\r\n                JOBS_FINISHED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, state=JobState.DEAD.value).inc()\r\n            else:\r\n                delay = compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n                    job.attempts,\r\n                    base=settings.backoff_base_seconds,\r\n                    multiplier=settings.backoff_multiplier,\r\n                    cap=settings.backoff_cap_seconds,\r\n                )\r\n                job.next_run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=delay)\r\n                job.is_enqueued = False\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job scheduled for retry\")\r\n\r\n    # Only XACK after DB commit succeeded.\r\n    await ack_job(queue, msg.entry_id)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def worker_loop(index: int, *, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    while True:\r\n        messages = await read_jobs(\r\n            queue=queue,\r\n            consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n            count=1,\r\n            block_ms=5_000,\r\n        )\r\n        if not messages:\r\n            continue\r\n        for msg in messages:\r\n            try:\r\n                await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n            except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                logger.exception(\"Unhandled error in worker loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def reclaim_loop(*, queue: str, consumer_name: str) -> None:\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    while True:\r\n        await asyncio.sleep(settings.reclaim_interval_sec)\r\n        try:\r\n            messages = await reclaim_stuck(\r\n                queue=queue,\r\n                consumer_name=consumer_name,\r\n                min_idle_ms=settings.visibility_timeout_ms,\r\n            )\r\n            for msg in messages:\r\n                try:\r\n                    await _process_message(msg, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)\r\n                except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n                    logger.exception(\r\n                        \"Unhandled error processing reclaimed message\",\r\n                        extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name},\r\n                    )\r\n            await update_queue_depth(queue)\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"Error in reclaim loop\", extra={\"consumer\": consumer_name})\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def main() -> None:\r\n    configure_logging(service=\"worker\")\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    # Start Prometheus metrics server for this process.\r\n    start_http_server(settings.metrics_port)\r\n\r\n    await init_db()\r\n    await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n\r\n    queue = settings.queue_default\r\n    consumer_name = f\"worker-{id(asyncio.current_task())}\"\r\n\r\n    tasks = [\r\n        asyncio.create_task(worker_loop(i, queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name))\r\n        for i in range(settings.worker_concurrency)\r\n    ]\r\n    tasks.append(asyncio.create_task(reclaim_loop(queue=queue, consumer_name=consumer_name)))\r\n\r\n    stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n\r\n    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\r\n\r\n    for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):\r\n        loop.add_signal_handler(sig, stop_event.set)\r\n\r\n    await stop_event.wait()\r\n    for t in tasks:\r\n        t.cancel()\r\n    await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    asyncio.run(main())\r\n\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "25937309b6196e7888a271b440f61da0503e4b67739bbfc0c18ed9968a830008", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Tuple\r\n\r\nimport redis.asyncio as redis\r\nfrom redis.exceptions import ResponseError\r\n\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .logging import get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL, QUEUE_DEPTH, WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"broker\")\r\n\r\n_redis_client: redis.Redis | None = None\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_redis() -> redis.Redis:\r\n    global _redis_client\r\n    if _redis_client is None:\r\n        settings = get_settings()\r\n        _redis_client = redis.from_url(settings.redis_url)\r\n    return _redis_client\r\n\r\n\r\ndef stream_for_queue(queue: str) -> str:\r\n    return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\r\n\r\n\r\nDEAD_LETTER_STREAM = \"jobs:dlq\"\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass BrokerMessage:\r\n    stream: str\r\n    entry_id: str\r\n    fields: Dict[str, Any]\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def ensure_group(queue: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Ensure the Redis Stream and consumer group exist.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        await client.xgroup_create(stream, settings.consumer_group, id=\"0-0\", mkstream=True)\r\n        logger.info(\"Created consumer group\", extra={\"stream\": stream})\r\n    except ResponseError as exc:\r\n        # BUSYGROUP means it already exists; ignore.\r\n        if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\r\n            raise\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def enqueue_job(\r\n    *,\r\n    job_id: str,\r\n    job_type: str,\r\n    queue: str,\r\n    idempotency_key: str | None,\r\n) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"XADD a job reference to the appropriate stream.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n    fields: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n        \"job_id\": job_id,\r\n        \"type\": job_type,\r\n        \"queue\": queue,\r\n    }\r\n    if idempotency_key:\r\n        fields[\"idempotency_key\"] = idempotency_key\r\n\r\n    entry_id = await client.xadd(stream, fields)\r\n    JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, queue=queue).inc()\r\n    return entry_id\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def push_dead_letter(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    return await client.xadd(DEAD_LETTER_STREAM, payload)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def read_jobs(\r\n    *,\r\n    queue: str,\r\n    consumer_name: str,\r\n    count: int,\r\n    block_ms: int,\r\n) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n    \"\"\"Read from Redis Streams via XREADGROUP.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n\r\n    streams = {stream: \">\"}\r\n    resp: List[Tuple[str, List[Tuple[str, Dict[bytes, bytes]]]]] | None = await client.xreadgroup(\r\n        groupname=settings.consumer_group,\r\n        consumername=consumer_name,\r\n        streams=streams,\r\n        count=count,\r\n        block=block_ms,\r\n    )\r\n    messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n    if not resp:\r\n        return messages\r\n\r\n    for stream_name, entries in resp:\r\n        for entry_id, raw_fields in entries:\r\n            decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n            messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream_name, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n    return messages\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def ack_job(queue: str, entry_id: str) -> int:\r\n    \"\"\"Acknowledge processing of a job.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n    return int(\r\n        await client.xack(\r\n            stream,\r\n            settings.consumer_group,\r\n            entry_id,\r\n        )\r\n    )\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def reclaim_stuck(\r\n    *,\r\n    queue: str,\r\n    consumer_name: str,\r\n    min_idle_ms: int,\r\n    count: int = 10,\r\n) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n    \"\"\"Reclaim messages that have been idle longer than min_idle_ms using XAUTOCLAIM.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n\r\n    start_id = \"0-0\"\r\n    messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        start_id, claimed = await client.xautoclaim(\r\n            stream,\r\n            settings.consumer_group,\r\n            consumer_name,\r\n            min_idle_ms,\r\n            start_id,\r\n            count=count,\r\n        )\r\n    except ResponseError:\r\n        # If group does not yet exist, nothing to reclaim.\r\n        return messages\r\n\r\n    for entry_id, raw_fields in claimed:\r\n        decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n        messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n\r\n    if messages:\r\n        WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL.inc(len(messages))\r\n\r\n    return messages\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def update_queue_depth(queue: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Update the queue depth gauge for a given queue.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    client = get_redis()\r\n    stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n    length = await client.xlen(stream)\r\n    QUEUE_DEPTH.labels(queue=queue).set(length)\r\n\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "a8cf00756f852eee38cffb17ee307f8ffeeade4b5246cfdb913b3a75a8fb35c7", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom functools import lru_cache\r\n\r\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings\r\n\r\n\r\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\r\n    \"\"\"Application configuration loaded from environment variables.\r\n\r\n    All services (API, worker, scheduler, CLI) share this configuration module.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n\r\n    service_name: str = \"api\"\r\n\r\n    # Persistence\r\n    db_url: str = \"sqlite+aiosqlite:///REDACTED\"\r\n\r\n    # Redis / broker\r\n    redis_url: str = \"redis://localhost:6379/0\"\r\n    queue_default: str = \"default\"\r\n    consumer_group: str = \"workers\"\r\n\r\n    # Worker behaviour\r\n    worker_concurrency: int = 4\r\n    visibility_timeout_ms: int = 30_000\r\n    reclaim_interval_sec: int = 10\r\n\r\n    # Scheduler behaviour\r\n    scheduler_interval_sec: int = 5\r\n\r\n    # Backoff defaults\r\n    backoff_base_seconds: float = 1.0\r\n    backoff_multiplier: float = 2.0\r\n    backoff_cap_seconds: float = 60.0\r\n\r\n    # Observability\r\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\r\n    metrics_port: int = 9000\r\n\r\n    class Config:\r\n        env_prefix = \"MINIQUEUE_\"\r\n        case_sensitive = False\r\n\r\n\r\n@lru_cache(maxsize=1)\r\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\r\n    \"\"\"Return cached settings instance.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    return Settings()\r\n\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "9006e7018a011b2fb83fb260d6c85335d73a8571e6f5fc2eef61874485290cc2", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport json\r\nimport logging\r\nimport sys\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict\r\n\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JsonFormatter(logging.Formatter):\r\n    \"\"\"Simple JSON log formatter with common correlation fields.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:\r\n        base: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n            \"ts\": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),\r\n            \"level\": record.levelname,\r\n            \"logger\": record.name,\r\n            \"message\": record.getMessage(),\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        # Standard extras we care about, if present\r\n        for field in (\"service\", \"job_id\", \"stream_id\", \"consumer\", \"attempt\", \"state\"):\r\n            value = getattr(record, field, None)\r\n            if value is not None:\r\n                base[field] = value\r\n\r\n        # Include arbitrary extra dict if provided\r\n        extra: Any = getattr(record, \"extra_fields\", None)\r\n        if isinstance(extra, dict):\r\n            base.update(extra)\r\n\r\n        return json.dumps(base, separators=(\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=False)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef configure_logging(service: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Configure root logging for the given service.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n\r\n    root = logging.getLogger()\r\n    if root.handlers:\r\n        # Already configured\r\n        return\r\n\r\n    root.setLevel(settings.log_level.upper())\r\n    handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)\r\n    handler.setFormatter(JsonFormatter())\r\n    root.addHandler(handler)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef get_logger(name: str, *, service: str | None = None) -> logging.Logger:\r\n    \"\"\"Get a logger with a bound service name.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    logger = logging.getLogger(name)\r\n    if service is not None:\r\n        # Add service name via LoggerAdapter\r\n        return logging.LoggerAdapter(logger, {\"service\": service})  # type: ignore[return-value]\r\n    return logger\r\n\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "9b65f28315f1caa08a6cb8a4e36533de0cb5c35bcae32c79cc05b7b191125711", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
```

OK","headers":{"Access-Control-Allow-Credentials":["true"],"Access-Control-Expose-Headers":["Grpc-Status, Grpc-Message, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin, Content-Encoding, Connect-Content-Encoding,
